response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across languages and tooling, with clear experience in test automation, CI/CD, and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course), aligning well with engineering productivity goals. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of people management beyond informal mentoring, and while he has 8+ years of dev experience, the 3-year technical leadership and 2-year people management thresholds are implied rather than clearly documented, raising uncertainty about readiness for a formal management role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (e.g., test runners, CI systems, Selenium course)
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives across diverse stacks and domains (mobile, embedded, web, GIS)
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing via workshops and public projects
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or build systems at scale
Resume emphasizes individual contributor work; managerial scope and organizational change experience are ambiguous
